name: Chinese Peas
recipeInstructions:
Serve these sparkling peas alongside any main dish.
Snap the ends from the pea pods and remove the strings.
Heat oil in a skillet. Add peas, water chestnuts, and stock.
Cover and cook over high heat for 3 minutes.
Combine cornstarch and cold water. Push the vegetables to one
side of the pan and add the cornstarch mixture to the liquid.
Cook, stirring until slightly thickened. Season to taste with salt.
Serve with soy sauce if desired.
